creator: toasty@home.dragondata.com
text:
> >Description:
> 
> 	Once or twice a day, under light load (avg under 0.30), the server
> 	will freeze up and no longer be able to start new processes or
> 	continue doing any useful work.  If "top" happens to be left
> 	running, it will always show "inode" as the status for all processes.
> 

Two questions, to see if you're seeing the same thing I am.

1) Are you using this system as an NFS client?

2) If you break into the debugger when it's frozen (ctrl-alt-escape) and
type 'ps', is at least one process stuck in 'vmopar'?


Kevin
